Rule.name: CNC_RME_JDBC_Table_To_Csv_Export
Rule.Description: Streams a large database table (100k+ rows) to a CSV file on the Linux application server using a JDBC Application connection. Uses forward-only cursors, JDBC fetch sizing, and buffered I/O to limit memory use. Sets file permissions to 777 after a successful export.

Argument.name: jdbcApplicationName
Argument.Description: Name of the IIQ JDBC Application that holds connection details (url, driver, user, password).

Argument.name: tableName
Argument.Description: Database table to export. Alphanumeric and underscore only. Optional schema prefix allowed (e.g. schema.my_table).

Argument.name: outputFilePath
Argument.Description: Absolute path on the Linux server for the output CSV file (e.g. /tmp/exports/my_table.csv).

Argument.name: selectSql
Argument.Description: Optional. Full SELECT statement. When provided, tableName is ignored.

Argument.name: whereClause
Argument.Description: Optional WHERE clause without the WHERE keyword (used only when selectSql is empty).

Argument.name: fetchSize
Argument.Description: Optional JDBC fetch size (rows per round-trip). Default 5000. Use 1000-10000 for large exports.

Argument.name: flushEveryRows
Argument.Description: Optional. Flush buffered file output every N data rows. Default 5000.

Argument.name: logProgressEveryRows
Argument.Description: Optional. Log progress every N data rows. Default 10000. Set 0 to disable.

Argument.name: queryTimeoutSeconds
Argument.Description: Optional JDBC query timeout in seconds. Default 7200 (2 hours). Set 0 for no timeout.
